project.name: Portable Lab Registry Fixture
project.description: A second local-only fixture used to prove registry tooling can validate and export another project without demo-specific code.

issues.title: Confirm non-demo registry export
issues.author: did:example:portable-lab-fixture
issues.summary: Keep a second fixture in the repository so CLI validation and exports are not tied to the demo project.

patches.title: Add portable export summary
patches.author: did:example:portable-lab-fixture
patches.summary: Synthetic patch record for second-fixture collaboration coverage; no live patch federation is claimed.

availability.notes: Synthetic non-byte-backed placeholder for second-fixture parser coverage only; no artifact file, CID, pin, paid storage, wallet, or durability claim exists.

verification_states.evidence: fixtures/portable-lab.registry.json rendered by scripts/forge_registry.py and covered by tests
verification_states.claim_boundary: Second local registry fixture only; no live protocol, durable storage, signing, or production claim.
verification_states.notes: Exists to prove reusable tooling over a non-demo registry object.

verification_states.evidence: No Radicle identity or RID is attached to the portable-lab fixture.
verification_states.claim_boundary: No Radicle live mapping, seed, clone, or network availability claim for this fixture.
verification_states.notes: The fixture intentionally exercises non-Radicle registry portability.

verification_states.evidence: Synthetic placeholder artifact metadata in fixtures/portable-lab.registry.json.

verification_states.notes: Real artifact metadata remains covered by fixtures/example-project.registry.json.

verification_states.evidence: No CI/provenance rows are attached to the portable-lab fixture.

verification_states.notes: Synthetic provenance remains isolated to the demo fixture.
